'''zanuru''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:offal|offal]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-n-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:offal|offal]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| zanuru
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zænirith|zænirith]] || [[word:zænirij|zænirij]] || [[word:zænirish|zænirish]] || [[word:zæniri|zæniri]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zanunuruth|zanunuruth]] || [[word:zanunuruj|zanunuruj]] || [[word:zanunurush|zanunurush]] || [[word:zanunuru|zanunuru]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zanuruth|zanuruth]] || [[word:zanuruj|zanuruj]] || [[word:zanurush|zanurush]] || [[word:zanuru|zanuru]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zanufruth|zanufruth]] || [[word:zanufruj|zanufruj]] || [[word:zanufrush|zanufrush]] || [[word:zanufruf|zanufruf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zanuruthu|zanuruthu]] || [[word:zanuruju|zanuruju]] || [[word:zanurushu|zanurushu]] || [[word:zanuruku|zanuruku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zanuruth|zanuruth]] || [[word:zanuruj|zanuruj]] || [[word:zanurush|zanurush]] || [[word:zanuru|zanuru]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zanuruthul|zanuruthul]] || [[word:zanurujul|zanurujul]] || [[word:zanurushul|zanurushul]] || [[word:zanurukul|zanurukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zanuruthuthu|zanuruthuthu]] || [[word:zanurujuju|zanurujuju]] || [[word:zanurushushu|zanurushushu]] || [[word:zanuruku|zanuruku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zanuruthun|zanuruthun]] || [[word:zanurujun|zanurujun]] || [[word:zanurushun|zanurushun]] || [[word:zanurukun|zanurukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zanuruthuoro|zanuruthuoro]] || [[word:zanurujuoro|zanurujuoro]] || [[word:zanurushuoro|zanurushuoro]] || [[word:zanurukuoro|zanurukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
